creator: shitman71@hotmail.com
text: I tested myself various things and none of the benchmarks or heating causes the machine to have any errors but some processes do cause this errors and they are only processes which also cause a high load onto the machine. To me the only solution preventing the machine from crashing for a far longer time was setting some power-settings. It must not be caused by the ram itself, the ram can trigger missbehavior within the cpu.
